---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
author: "Tymesha Bovell"
format: html
---

```{r}
# Loading Libraries 

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)

# Use trap data

lobster_traps <- read_csv(here::here("data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv"))
head(lobster_traps)

```
